confidenceNote: Commits are publicly announced only. Targets are from public reports (247Sports, On3, ESPN). No private intel is fabricated. Confidence labels reflect source quality.

classSnapshot.note: Summer visit season open through July 4 dead period. Staff targeting EDGE and WR as top needs.

commits.name: Easton Royal
commits.depthChartFit: Eventual WR starter 2027-2028. Elite 5-star upside makes him WR room anchor post-Coleman/Wingo.
commits.whyTexas: Legacy program, Arch Manning connection, Sarkisian's pro-style offense fits his skill set. New Orleans to Austin recruiting pipeline.
commits.projectedImpact: Immediate contributor potential. 5-star WR from New Orleans — shares hometown with Arch Manning.

commits.name: Cameron Hall
commits.depthChartFit: EDGE depth behind Colin Simmons. Long-term rotation piece as Simmons enters NFL Draft.
commits.whyTexas: Texas native. Simmons as a mentorship attraction. Staff's track record developing EDGE rushers.
commits.projectedImpact: 2027 rotation EDGE. Crucial for depth behind Simmons.

commits.name: Jackson Cook
commits.depthChartFit: Interior OL development piece. Austin native at a premier Texas program.
commits.whyTexas: Hometown school. Westlake pipeline. Proximity to family.

commits.name: Derwin Fields
commits.depthChartFit: Second EDGE of the cycle alongside Hall. Long-term rotation piece.
commits.whyTexas: Simmons blueprint. Staff's ability to develop EDGE rushers for the NFL.
commits.projectedImpact: Second EDGE commitment solidifies pass-rush future post-Simmons.

commits.name: Noah Roberts
commits.depthChartFit: Future lead back behind Brown and Smothers. Bridge RB for 2027-2028.
commits.whyTexas: Portal success attracting talent. Texas's recent RB production (Bijan, etc.) is the pitch.
commits.projectedImpact: Future RB starter as Brown/Smothers phase out.

commits.name: Brock Williams
commits.depthChartFit: Long-term TE solution. Ideal receiving TE profile for Sarkisian's offense.
commits.whyTexas: Sarkisian's track record developing NFL TEs. Manning as the target QB is a massive draw.
commits.projectedImpact: Future TE starter who fits the Sarkisian offense perfectly.

commits.name: JT Geraci
commits.whyTexas: East Coast pipeline. Program prestige and Manning connection.
commits.projectedImpact: TE depth piece and developmental player.

commits.name: Karnell James
commits.depthChartFit: Safety depth. Texas native — Manvel pipeline.

targets.name: John Meredith III
targets.whyTexas: Texas native. Arch Manning mentorship pipeline is the headline. Familiarity with Sarkisian's offense.
targets.depthChartFit: Future QB1 candidate. Would compete with KJ Lacey for the starting job post-Manning.

targets.name: Jaylen Mbakwe
targets.whyTexas: Texas native. Would follow in footsteps of Bond, Mitchell in the Texas-to-elite-WR pipeline.
targets.depthChartFit: Immediate WR1 candidate after Coleman/Wingo depart. Texas urgently needs this.

targets.name: Devin Sanchez
targets.whyTexas: Texas native. Would play alongside Malik Muhammad — a paired recruiting pitch rarely available.
targets.depthChartFit: CB starter candidate for 2027-2028. Paired with Muhammad would give Texas elite CB duo depth.

targets.name: Malachi Nelson Jr.
targets.whyTexas: Texas native. The Manning QB factory pitch — become the next elite QB out of Austin.
targets.depthChartFit: QB1 candidate 2027+. Would be groomed similarly to how Manning was groomed behind Ewers.

targets.name: Brashard Smith
targets.whyTexas: Texas native. Strong track record with RBs (Bijan Robinson). NIL market in Austin is top-tier.
targets.depthChartFit: Future RB depth behind Noah Roberts. Provides long-term backfield depth.

targets.name: Anthony Jones Jr.
targets.whyTexas: Texas native. Fills the urgent OT need left by Kelvin Banks Jr.'s early NFL departure.
targets.depthChartFit: Future OT starter. Texas's single most critical recruiting need entering summer 2026.

targets.name: Caleb Carmouche
targets.whyTexas: New Orleans connection (Arch Manning/Easton Royal pipeline).
targets.depthChartFit: Safety depth. Texas needs long-term safety development.

targets.name: Elijah Griffin
targets.whyTexas: Simmons/Texas EDGE pipeline. Long shot given geography but Texas is on his list.
targets.depthChartFit: Elite EDGE addition would pair with Hall/Fields for dominant EDGE future class.

positionNeeds.context: Kelvin Banks Jr. (1st round) departed. Offensive tackle is the highest-priority remaining need. Internal development of Goosby/Chatman is the bridge.
positionNeeds.recruiting2027: Anthony Jones Jr. (4★, Cedar Hill TX) — priority target per public reports.
positionNeeds.portal: Deondre Jackson (Ole Miss) — Texas in top 3 per public reports.

positionNeeds.context: Hall and Fields committed. A third edge rusher would complete the position. Colin Simmons returns but depth behind him is critical to develop.
positionNeeds.recruiting2027: Cameron Hall (4★) + Derwin Fields (4★) — both committed. Elijah Griffin (5★) — monitoring.
positionNeeds.portal: No confirmed EDGE portal additions as of June 2026.

positionNeeds.context: Lost Bond, Mitchell, Cook II to graduation/NFL. Five WRs added via portal. Easton Royal (5★) anchors 2027 class. Coleman and Wingo are both final-year players.
positionNeeds.recruiting2027: Easton Royal (5★) — committed. Jaylen Mbakwe (5★, Houston) — trending per reports.
positionNeeds.portal: Cam Coleman (5★, Auburn) added as immediate starter. TJ Moore (Michigan) listed as remaining portal target.

positionNeeds.context: Derek Williams Jr. fills one spot via portal. Blue-chip 2027 corner depth is a priority. Malik Muhammad's eventual departure will need replacement.
positionNeeds.recruiting2027: Devin Sanchez (5★, Houston TX) — top CB priority per public reports.
positionNeeds.portal: Derek Williams Jr. (Penn State) added as projected CB1 starter.

positionNeeds.context: Anthony Hill Jr. (1st round) departed early. Rasheem Biles added via portal but does not fully replace Hill's production and versatility.
positionNeeds.recruiting2027: No current 2027 LB commitment — priority need per public reports.
positionNeeds.portal: Rasheem Biles (Ohio State, Sr.) added as projected immediate starter.

positionNeeds.context: Arch Manning is the established starter. MJ Morris (portal) provides depth. One 2027 QB is a genuine staff priority for long-term planning.
positionNeeds.recruiting2027: John Meredith III (5★, DFW) · Malachi Nelson Jr. (5★, Denton) — per public reports.
positionNeeds.portal: MJ Morris added (NC State, Sr.). Jaxson Dart listed as monitoring.

positionNeeds.context: Raleek Brown and Hollywood Smothers added via portal. Noah Roberts committed in 2027. Staff well-positioned at RB entering summer.
positionNeeds.recruiting2027: Noah Roberts (4★, AZ) — committed. Brashard Smith (4★, TX) — trending per reports.
positionNeeds.portal: Brown + Smothers added. Kaytron Allen (Penn State) listed as visit target per reports.

positionNeeds.context: Jackson Cook committed at interior OL. Staff likely needs one more interior lineman to fully address OL depth.
positionNeeds.recruiting2027: Jackson Cook (4★, Austin TX) — committed. Additional targets per recruiting analysts.
positionNeeds.portal: No confirmed IOL portal targets as of June 2026.

positionNeeds.context: Karnell James committed in 2027. Staff may add one more depending on visit season. Long-term safety depth is a quiet priority.
positionNeeds.recruiting2027: Karnell James (3★, Manvel TX) — committed. Caleb Carmouche (4★) — monitoring.
positionNeeds.portal: Malaki Starks (Georgia) — monitoring; likely stays or NFL per reports.

positionNeeds.context: T'Vondre Sweat graduated/drafted. Richard Wesley (4★) signed in 2026 is one piece. Interior DL development is an underrated need.
positionNeeds.recruiting2027: No current 2027 DT commitment — listed as a priority need by analysts.
positionNeeds.portal: No confirmed portal additions at DT as of June 2026.

positionNeeds.context: JT Geraci and Brock Williams both committed in 2027. Michael Masunas added via portal. TE room is in reasonable shape.
positionNeeds.recruiting2027: Brock Williams (4★) + JT Geraci (3★) — both committed.

positionNeeds.context: Jake Collett (K) and Mikey Bukauskas (P) both signed in 2026. No active special teams need at this time.
positionNeeds.portal: No ST portal activity as of June 2026.

activityTimeline.text: Class sits at #15 On3 / #26 247Sports with 8 publicly named commits. Summer visit season open through July 4 dead period.
Brock Williams (TE, Libertyville, IL) publicly commits to Texas. 6'5" tight end is the second TE of the cycle.
Noah Roberts (RB, Basha / Chandler, AZ) commits. 4-star back fills the early RB need.
Derwin Fields (EDGE, Brookhaven, MS) commits. Third pass rusher added alongside Cameron Hall.
Derek Williams Jr. (CB, Penn State) joins Texas via transfer portal. 2025 Big Ten All-Conference, projected CB1 starter.
Rasheem Biles (LB, Ohio State) transfers to Texas. Projected immediate starter at linebacker.
Jackson Cook (OL, Westlake / Austin, TX) commits. First interior OL of the cycle.
Cam Coleman (WR, Auburn) transfers to Texas. 5-star prospect, ranked top-10 WR nationally in recruiting.
Raleek Brown (RB, Oklahoma State) and Hollywood Smothers (RB, Arizona State) both join via portal.
WR depth added via portal: Emmett Mosley V (Stanford), Sterling Berkhalter (Tennessee), Ty Boatright (Oklahoma State), Rett Andersen (Stanford).
MJ Morris (QB, NC State) joins as depth. Michael Masunas (TE, Navy) joins as projected TE starter.
Cameron Hall (DE, Mansfield Summit / Arlington, TX) commits. First defensive commit of the 2027 cycle.
Easton Royal (WR, Brother Martin / New Orleans, LA) commits. 5-star, 97.33 On3 composite. First commit of the 2027 cycle.
